response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with nearly two decades of experience, but their profile is misaligned with this role's core requirements. Their professional C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015; since then they have focused on TypeScript/Node.js web development and DLang systems work. They show no evidence of MQTT, message brokers in an industrial context, IEC 62443/SDL practices, or industrial automation domain experience, all of which are central to this position.
strengths: Deep systems experience with low-latency, high-throughput services (async I/O, caching, fibers) at Dunnhumby
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, and community teaching/mentoring
Broad full-stack range covering web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, with event-driven platform experience
concerns: Minimal recent professional C++/STL experience; last dedicated C++ role ended in 2015
No industrial cybersecurity, SDL, or IEC 62443 exposure evident on the resume
No demonstrated MQTT, industrial protocol (Modbus, OPC UA), or IoT/automation domain background
